== Notes for [[Item:Q91393|Q91393]] ==

•ID: I135927

•Name: ATHENAEUS OF (L) CYZICUS

•Sex: M

•ALIA: (L) /ATHENAEUS/

•Birth: in BC

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

1. APOLLONIS OF (L) CYZICUS b: in BC

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=pusch&id=I135927

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
